---
title: "Research Questions"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r, load packages and load up working directory}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(Rmisc)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(stringr)
#install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)
#install.packages("lubridate")
#install.packages("lmerTest")
library(lmerTest)
#install.packages("ggeffects")
library(ggeffects)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData/GitHub/DepositionSFB/data')
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
combined <-read_excel("C:/Users/savan/OneDrive/Desktop/stats/combined.xlsx")



str(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150)
```

```{r}


# Dropped variables relating to LOI and temporal as they are represented already within the Study.Phase variable
#usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150 <- usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150 %>% 
  #select(-Date.placed.in.field, -Date.removed.from.field)

marshedge <- usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150 %>%
  dplyr::filter(!Study.Dataset %in% c("USGS"))

marshedge <- usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150 %>%
  select(-LOI, -Study.Dataset)

avgtotal = aggregate(Flux ~ Site + Dist + Replicate + Month + Study.Phase + marsh_orientation + marsh_edge_type, data = marshedge, FUN = mean)
avgtotal

str(avgtotal)
```

```{r, statistics}

shapiro.test(avgtotal$Flux)
shapiro.test(log(avgtotal$Flux))

qqnorm(avgtotal$Flux)

qqline(avgtotal$Flux)

shapiro.test(resid(distsitemodel))

qqnorm(resid(distsitemodel))
qqline(resid(distsitemodel))

```

```{r, Question 1-marsh edge type}

marsh_edge_model_edge<- lmer(Flux ~marsh_edge_type + (1|Dist), data = avgtotal)
summary(marsh_edge_model_edge)

marsh_edge_model_orient<- lmer(Flux ~marsh_orientation + (1|Dist), data = avgtotal)
summary(marsh_edge_model_orient)


```

```{r}
colnames(avgtotal)

# Check if they exist and what they're called
grep("marsh", colnames(avgtotal), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
```

```{r}

ggplot(avgtotal, aes(x = marsh_edge_type, y = log(Flux), fill = marsh_orientation)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_sina(alpha = 0.6, size = 2, aes(colour = marsh_orientation)) +
  labs(
    x = "Marsh Edge Type",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm³)",
    fill = "Marsh Orientation",
    colour = "Marsh Orientation"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18))

ggplot(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150, aes(x = marsh_edge_type, y = log(Flux), fill = marsh_orientation)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("East.facing" = "#E07070", 
                                "South.facing" = "#70B870",
                                "West.facing" = "#7090D0")) +
  theme_bw()

```

```{r}
str(usgs_thesis)
```

```{r}
emm <- emmeans(marsh_edge_model_time, ~ Site * Year)
emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)

ggplot() +
  geom_jitter(data = avgtotal, aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = Flux, color = Site),
              alpha = 0.3, width = 0.2) +
  geom_point(data = emm_df, aes(x = as.factor(Year), y = emmean, color = Site),
             size = 4, position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  geom_errorbar(data = emm_df, aes(x = as.factor(Year), ymin = lower.CL, 
                ymax = upper.CL, color = Site),
                width = 0.2, position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  labs(title = "Flux by Site and Year",
       y = "Flux (g/cm^3/month)", x = "Year") +
  theme_bw()


# Get estimated marginal means for Site and Year
emm <- emmeans(marsh_edge_model_time, ~ Site * Year)
emm_df <- as.data.frame(emm)

ggplot(emm_df, aes(x = Year, y = emmean, color = Site, group = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), width = 0.2) +
  labs(title = "Estimated Flux by Site and Year",
       y = "Flux (g/cm^3/month)", x = "Year") +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r, edge type over time}

# Plot 2A: Boxplot with jitter
ggplot(avgtotal, aes(x = marsh_edge_type, y = Flux, fill = marsh_edge_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.4, width = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = max(avgtotal$Flux) * 0.95,
           label = "***", size = 8, color = "black") +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(title = str_wrap("Sediment Flux by Marsh Edge Type", width = 40),
       y = "Log of Average Flux (g/m³/day)",
       x = "Marsh Edge Type") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

```

```{r}


# Plot 1A: Boxplot with jitter
ggplot(avgtotal, aes(x = marsh_orientation, y = Flux, fill = marsh_orientation)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.4, width = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 3, y = max(avgtotal$Flux) * 0.95,
           label = "***", size = 8, color = "black") +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(title = str_wrap("Sediment Flux by Marsh Orientation", width = 40),
       y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm³/month)",
       x = "Marsh Orientation") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
```
